A lovely little ice cream shop located up by the castello in Malcesine. We visited every night during our stay because it was just so good! We really enjoyed the brownie flavor, mango, yogurt and also pistachio was good!
îŁś

Response from the owner a week ago
Hi Jana, thank you for visiting us every night! We are thrilled you loved our brownie, mango, yogurt, and pistachio flavors. Hope to welcome you back to Malcesine soon. Fabrizio

Delicious vegan options- Dark chocolate, pistachio and hazelnut. They were separate to the other gelato display. All were delicious and a great price, cheaper than other places. Would highly recommend as best tasted around Lake Garda. There are a few benches just up from it to sit and enjoy them and the view.

Itâ€™s great to know you appreciated the fair pricing and found a nice spot on the benches to enjoy the view. We look forward to seeing you again for the best taste around Lake Garda! Fabrizio

Amazing gelato! It was the best we have ever tasted. The mango flavour was by far our favourite, but Nutella came a close second. The staff were very friendly. Highly recommend a visit if youâ€™re in Malcesine.
